description:
Offered: every semester
This course examines the interdependency of the world’s nations by focusing on current events in the international area and issues such as ozone depletion, pollution, the global economy, conflict and cooperation, population and hunger. Cross-listed with POLS 1800
Note: Credit will not be given for both IDIS 1800 and POLS 1800 .
Meets General Education Requirement(s): DP
